About Neil

A commercial operator who thinks like a strategist

I've spent 13+ years leading global organizations through complexity — not just executing playbooks, but building the systems, teams, and strategic clarity that make performance sustainable.

My background spans digital commerce, organizational transformation, and operational strategy across APAC, EMEA, North America, and South Africa. I operate best where the problems are real, the stakes are high, and conventional wisdom has stopped working.

I'm equally comfortable translating vision downward into operating reality, and translating ground-level complexity upward into executive decision-making. That bridge is rare — and it's where I tend to create the most value.
